name: PAY_DIR_CARD_COMP_DEFS_VL
query: SELECT pdccdf.DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID, pdccdf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pdccdf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pdccdf.DIR_CARD_DEFINITION_ID DIR_CARD_DEFINITION_ID, pdccdf.DEDUCTION_TYPE_ID DEDUCTION_TYPE_ID, pdccdf.DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID DEDUCTION_GROUP_ID, pdccdf.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, pdccdf.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, pdccdf.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pdccdf.DEFAULTING_TRU_COMP_FLAG DEFAULTING_TRU_COMP_FLAG, pdccdf.BREAKDOWN_COMPONENT_FLAG BREAKDOWN_COMPONENT_FLAG, pdccdf.KEEP_OPEN KEEP_OPEN, pdccdf.GLB_TRANSFER_RULE GLB_TRANSFER_RULE, pdccdf.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID ELEMENT_TYPE_ID, pdccdf.REQUIRED REQUIRED, pdccdf.MULTIPLE_ALLOWED MULTIPLE_ALLOWED, pdccdf.BASE_COMPONENT_NAME BASE_COMPONENT_NAME, pdccdtl.COMPONENT_NAME COMPONENT_NAME, pdccdf.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pdccdf.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pdccdf.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pdccdf.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pdccdf.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pdccdf.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pdccdf.ASSOCIABLE_TRU ASSOCIABLE_TRU, pdccdf.ASSOCIABLE_TERM ASSOCIABLE_TERM, pdccdf.SEED_STATUS SEED_STATUS, pdccdf.SGUID SGUID, pdccdf.USER_EXTENSIBLE_FLAG, pdccdf.ATTACHMENT_ENTITY_NAME, pdccdf.KEEP_OPEN_ON_PROCD_REC, pdccdf.NAVIGATION_USE FROM PAY_DIR_CARD_COMP_DEFS_F pdccdf, PAY_DIR_CARD_COMP_DEFS_TL pdccdtl WHERE pdccdf.DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID = pdccdtl.DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID AND pdccdtl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
